titleStmt.title: SII 22.420: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 420. (A.R. No. 420 of 1906) TIRUNELVELI DISTRICT, TIRUNELVELI TALUK, ŚIVALAPPĒRI. AḺAGAR TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL RĀJARĀJA I—23rd YEAR (A.D. 1007-08)

summary.p: This begins with Tirumagaḷpōla introduction. This is a Vaṭṭeḻuttu inscription which is mutilated towards the end. It seems to record a gift (of 15 cows ?) for a perpetual lamp in the temple at Tirumāliruñjōlai in Kīḻkaḷakkūṟṟam said to be a division of Rājarāja-vaḷanāḍu, by a native of Tirunelvēli in Kīḻvembaināḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumakaḷpolap perunilaccelviyun taṉakke Urimai pūṇṭamai maṉakkoḷak kāntaḷūrc cālai kalamaṟuttaruḷi veṅkaināṭuṅ kaṅka pāṭiyu nu
ḷampapāṭiyuṅ kollamuṅ kaliṅkamuṅ kuṭamalaināṭum Eṇṭicaipukaḻtara Īḻamaṇṭalamum Iraṭṭapāṭi Eḻarai Ilakkamun tiṇṭiṟal veṉ
ḻinvaḷar Ūḻiyuḷellāyāṇṭun toḻutaka viḷaṅkum yāṇṭe ceḻiyarait tecukoḷ [śrī ko] Irājarājakecarivarma śrī rājarājatevarkku yāṇṭu Iru pattumuṉ
ṭu rājarājavaḷanāṭṭu kiḻkaḷakkūṟṟattu teṉṉirumāliruñcolai Emperumā ṉukku kiḻvempaināṭṭut tirunelveli Uṭaiya perumāṉaṭikaḷ kāri
Iḷaiṉāṭṭuc cuttacaṅkapāṇi vaicca tiruviḷakku nilaiviḷakku Oṉṟu Itaṉukku nicatam cantirātittavalam Eriya vaicca ney paṇṭāra Uḻakkāl ney Āḻākkiṉukku vai
ṉaiñcu Ivaikoṇṭu Ittiruviḷakku ney muṭṭāmal Aṭṭuvatāṉamaiy llām Itaṉukkum Ittiruviḷakku neyyumuṭṭāmal Aṭṭuvataṟkkum
Digital edition of SII 22.420 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
